reportedIssues: The right side of the category row is clipped, with the 'Hot Games' chip only partially visible.
Several game tiles in the featured rows are cut off at the right edge, suggesting the content container is too narrow or overflowing horizontally.
The sticky bottom navigation overlaps the main content, hiding the lower row of game cards behind it.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention the jackpot value or any negative number display; all reported issues concern layout/clipping problems with game tiles and navigation.
